positive: A central, highly detailed illustration of interconnected celestial bodies and stylized nature elements, rendered in a clean, retro-futuristic vector art style. Main elements include a crescent moon, minimalist stylized constellations (like the Big Dipper), swirling cosmic nebula shapes, and highly defined tropical flora (palm fronds, hibiscus flowers). The composition must have a strong, central vertical symmetry suitable for apparel placement. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, electric teal, burnished gold, and stark white. The linework should be bold and sharp, achieving a crisp, negative-space silhouette effect. The overall mood is mysterious and harmonious, designed for maximum visual pop on fabric.
negative: blurry, photo, realistic, 3d render, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, noisy, grain, poor anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame
